title: 'Pushing this competition': SpaceX's Starship might not fly on NASA's newly revamped Artemis 3 mission
description: NASA's Artemis 3 mission will no longer land astronauts on the moon —and it might not involve SpaceX's Starship megarocket, either.
content: NASA's Artemis 3 mission will no longer land astronauts on the moon —and it might not involve SpaceX's Starship megarocket, either.
